_note: Pre-migration equivalent of ModelCallInput for the builder atom. Captures the resolved system+user-prompt+tools+sandbox payload that invokeBuilder hands to invokeClaude (src/engine/pipeline/build.exec.ts:89). Phase 5 will assert that the builder atom's pipe(stable.prompt, model_call) constructs an equivalent ModelCallInput from the same frozen BuilderArgs, byte-stable for the keys/strings/array order listed below.

frozen_builder_args.phaseSpecMd:
# Phase 1: Stub

## Goal

Frozen fixture phase used as the stable input for the prompt-cache hit-rate baseline test.

## Acceptance Criteria

- This file is loaded verbatim by assembleUserPrompt.

user_prompt_section_order: taste.md (data block — present when tastePath set)
Project Design (data block — present when .ridgeline/design.md exists)
Feature Design (data block — present when buildDir/design.md exists)
Available Assets (instruction block — present when asset-catalog.json exists)
Learnings from Previous Builds (data block — present when .ridgeline/learnings.md non-empty)
handoff.md (data block — present when handoff exists)
Check Command (instruction block — present when config.checkCommand set)
Reviewer Feedback (RETRY) (data block — present only on retry)
resolved_modelcall_input.agents_flag: buildAgentRegistry().getAgentsFlag() — undefined when registry is empty

fingerprint._note: Phase 5's byte-stability test will compute a sha256 over the canonical-JSON serialization of the resolved ModelCallInput for the frozen_builder_args case (after path-and-cwd substitution into deterministic placeholders) and compare it against this fingerprint. The fingerprint is left null at Phase 1 because the Phase 5 test will materialize the input from the new substrate; setting it now would lock against the legacy stringification, which differs cosmetically.
